mpeg_o.query
============

.. py:module:: mpeg_o.query

.. autoapi-nested-parse::

   ``Query`` — compressed-domain query builder over ``SpectrumIndex``.



Classes
-------

.. autoapisummary::

   mpeg_o.query.Query


Module Contents
---------------

.. py:class:: Query

   Compressed-domain query against a :class:`SpectrumIndex`.

   Predicates are combined with AND (intersection). The query
   operates entirely on the in-memory index arrays — signal-channel
   datasets are never opened, so a 10k-spectrum scan completes in
   under a millisecond and never touches the encrypted intensity
   stream.

   .. rubric:: Notes

   API status: Stable.

   Cross-language equivalents
   --------------------------
   Objective-C: ``MPGOQuery`` · Java:
   ``com.dtwthalion.mpgo.Query``.


   .. py:attribute:: index
      :type:  mpeg_o.acquisition_run.SpectrumIndex


   .. py:method:: on_index(index: mpeg_o.acquisition_run.SpectrumIndex) -> Query
      :classmethod:


      Start a query on the given index.



   .. py:method:: with_retention_time_range(value_range: mpeg_o.value_range.ValueRange) -> Query


   .. py:method:: with_ms_level(level: int) -> Query


   .. py:method:: with_polarity(polarity: mpeg_o.enums.Polarity) -> Query


   .. py:method:: with_precursor_mz_range(value_range: mpeg_o.value_range.ValueRange) -> Query


   .. py:method:: with_base_peak_intensity_at_least(threshold: float) -> Query


   .. py:method:: matching_indices() -> list[int]

      Return the indices that match all predicates (AND).
